requirement_topic.en: Customs Clearance — Uganda Revenue Authority (URA) / EAC Common External Tariff
requirement_topic.zh: 海关清关——乌干达税务局（URA）/ 东非共同体共同对外关税
requirement_topic.zht: 海關清關——烏干達稅務局（URA）/ 東非共同體共同對外關稅

summary.en: All goods imported into Uganda must be cleared through Uganda Revenue Authority (URA) customs. Uganda applies the East African Community Common External Tariff (EAC CET) to imports from non-EAC countries including China. Wireless and IoT consumer electronics generally attract EAC CET rates of 0–25% depending on HS code classification (HS Chapter 85). Value Added Tax (VAT) at 18% applies to most electronic imports. An Import Declaration Form (IDF) must be lodged electronically via the URA e-Customs platform before shipment. Goods must be accompanied by a valid UCC type approval certificate at the point of customs clearance; URA officers may detain shipments of uncertified telecom equipment pending UCC verification.
summary.zh: 所有进口至乌干达的货物须通过乌干达税务局（URA）完成海关清关。乌干达对来自非东非共同体国家（含中国）的进口商品适用东非共同体共同对外关税（EAC CET）。无线及物联网消费电子产品通常适用0–25%的EAC CET税率（视HS编码分类而定，属于HS第85章）。大多数电子进口品须缴纳18%增值税（VAT）。货物发运前须通过URA电子海关平台以电子方式提交进口申报单（IDF）。海关清关时货物须附有有效的UCC型式批准证书；URA人员可在等待UCC核验期间扣押未持证电信设备的货物。
summary.zht: 所有進口至烏干達的貨物須通過烏干達稅務局（URA）完成海關清關。烏干達對來自非東非共同體國家（含中國）的進口商品適用東非共同體共同對外關稅（EAC CET）。無線及物聯網消費電子產品通常適用0–25%的EAC CET稅率（視HS編碼分類而定，屬於HS第85章）。大多數電子進口品須繳納18%增值稅（VAT）。貨物發運前須通過URA電子海關平台以電子方式提交進口申報單（IDF）。海關清關時貨物須附有有效的UCC型式批准證書；URA人員可在等待UCC核驗期間扣押未持證電信設備的貨物。

standards_or_laws: EAC Customs Management Act 2004 (as applied by Uganda)
EAC Common External Tariff (CET) — HS Chapter 85 (electrical and electronic equipment)
Uganda VAT Act Cap 349 (18% VAT on electronic imports)
URA Import Declaration Form (IDF) e-Customs platform
Uganda Communications Act 2013 (UCC certificate required at customs)

summary.en: Chinese exports to Uganda require standard Chinese export customs clearance through China Customs (GACC). Chinese exporters must lodge an export declaration, obtain an export licence if the goods fall under dual-use or controlled categories, and ensure that goods are classified under the correct HS code for Chinese export tariff purposes. There is no Chinese regulatory requirement that corresponds to Uganda's inbound IDF, EAC CET, or UCC-certificate-at-customs obligation — these are entirely Uganda-side requirements.
summary.zh: 中国出口至乌干达的货物须通过中国海关（GACC）完成标准出口清关。中国出口商须提交出口申报单，如货物属于两用或受控类别还须取得出口许可证，并确保按中国出口关税目的下的正确HS编码归类。中国法规中无与乌干达入境IDF、EAC CET或海关凭UCC证书放行要求直接对应的规定——这些完全属于乌干达方面的要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口至烏干達的貨物須通過中國海關（GACC）完成標準出口清關。中國出口商須提交出口申報單，如貨物屬於兩用或受控類別還須取得出口許可證，並確保按中國出口關稅目的下的正確HS編碼歸類。中國法規中無與烏干達入境IDF、EAC CET或海關憑UCC證書放行要求直接對應的規定——這些完全屬於烏干達方面的要求。

standards_or_laws: China Customs Law (General Administration of Customs — GACC)
China Foreign Trade Law (export declaration and licensing)
China Dual-Use Items and Technologies Export Control Regulations (if applicable)

gap.en: Chinese exporters must coordinate with the Ugandan local importer to ensure: (1) an IDF is lodged via URA e-Customs before shipment; (2) EAC CET duties and 18% VAT are accounted for in landed cost calculations; (3) a valid UCC type approval certificate accompanies the shipment at customs — failure to hold a UCC certificate at the point of entry may result in detention or seizure of goods by URA; and (4) HS code classification is agreed between exporter and importer to avoid under/over-declaration.
gap.zh: 中国出口商须与乌干达本地进口商协调，确保：（1）在发货前通过URA电子海关平台提交IDF；（2）在到岸成本测算中考虑EAC CET关税和18%增值税；（3）货物在海关清关时随附有效UCC型式批准证书——入境时未持有UCC证书可能导致URA扣押货物；（4）出口商与进口商就HS编码分类达成一致，以避免申报不足或过度申报。
gap.zht: 中國出口商須與烏干達本地進口商協調，確保：（1）在發貨前通過URA電子海關平台提交IDF；（2）在到岸成本測算中考慮EAC CET關稅和18%增值稅；（3）貨物在海關清關時隨附有效UCC型式批准證書——入境時未持有UCC證書可能導致URA扣押貨物；（4）出口商與進口商就HS編碼分類達成一致，以避免申報不足或過度申報。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] All wireless and IoT device imports into Uganda must clear URA customs with a lodged IDF, applicable EAC CET duties, and 18% VAT. A valid UCC type approval certificate is required at the point of customs entry; goods without UCC certification risk detention by URA. These are Uganda-side import obligations with no Chinese regulatory shortcut.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有进口至乌干达的无线及物联网设备须完成URA海关清关，需提交IDF、缴纳适用EAC CET关税及18%增值税。入境海关时须持有有效UCC型式批准证书；未持UCC认证证书的货物面临被URA扣押的风险。上述均属乌干达方面进口义务，无中国法规捷径可用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有進口至烏干達的無線及物聯網裝置須完成URA海關清關，需提交IDF、繳納適用EAC CET關稅及18%增值稅。入境海關時須持有有效UCC型式批准證書；未持UCC認證證書的貨物面臨被URA扣押的風險。上述均屬烏干達方面進口義務，無中國法規捷徑可用。
